context: Agent generates a production EKS child module with two dependency blocks, correctly typed mock_outputs, prevent_destroy, and proper include/locals patterns.

checklist.name: Named include block with find_in_parent_folders(root.hcl)
checklist.description: Generated file uses 'include "root" { path = find_in_parent_folders("root.hcl") }' with the named label and explicit filename.

checklist.name: env.hcl read via locals block
checklist.description: Generated file contains a locals block with 'env = read_terragrunt_config(find_in_parent_folders("env.hcl"))' and accesses environment values via local.env.locals.*

checklist.name: vpc dependency with correctly typed mock_outputs
checklist.description: vpc dependency block has mock_outputs with vpc_id as a string ("vpc-mock") and private_subnet_ids as a list of strings (["subnet-mock-1"]) — types must match expected output types.

checklist.name: iam dependency with mock_outputs
checklist.description: iam dependency block has mock_outputs with eks_role_arn as a string mock value.

checklist.name: mock_outputs_allowed_terraform_commands on all dependencies
checklist.description: Both dependency blocks include mock_outputs_allowed_terraform_commands = ["validate", "plan", "destroy"] or equivalent.

checklist.name: prevent_destroy = true present
checklist.description: Generated file includes prevent_destroy = true to protect the production EKS cluster from accidental deletion.
